content: This great article is a demo of Story’s ability to typeset mathematical equations, both inline and in block form.
title: Math

content: Story supports author profiles, so you can highlight your bio. It’s possible to set this globally for the entire site, or individually for each piece of content. Or you can set a global default and override it on individual pieces of content. Scroll to the bottom of any page on this site to see how author profiles are styled.
title: Author Pages

content: Froede Vrolijk is a Software Engineer working in The Netherlands.
